name: Ubiquiti airCube Home WiFi AP
title: Ubiquiti airCube Home WiFi AP
title_extended: Ubiquiti airCube Home WiFi AP – 2.4/5GHz, AirMax, 4x GLAN, 802.11ac 2x2

detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti airCube Home WiFi Access Point (AP)  is a compact and stylish wireless access point designed to deliver seamless Wi-Fi coverage within residential settings. Engineered by Ubiquiti Networks, a company renowned for its innovative and high-performance networking products, the airCube AC is an essential component for creating a reliable and efficient home network. Its sleek design not only complements the aesthetics of modern home interiors but also packs a powerful performance to meet the demands of today’s connected lifestyle.

At the heart of the airCube AC is its dual-band technology, which supports the latest 802.11ac Wi-Fi standard. This technology enables the device to offer high-speed internet connectivity with a maximum throughput of up to 866 Mbps on the 5 GHz band and up to 300 Mbps on the 2.4 GHz band. Such capability ensures smooth streaming, gaming, and browsing experiences across multiple devices simultaneously, making it an ideal solution for households with high internet usage.

One of the standout features of the airCube AC is its integrated four-port Gigabit Ethernet switch. This feature allows users to directly connect wired devices such as desktop computers, gaming consoles, and smart TVs, ensuring stable and fast connections. The inclusion of a Gigabit Ethernet port further enhances its functionality by providing the option to connect to an existing router or modem, thereby extending the Wi-Fi coverage and performance throughout the home.

Ease of setup and management is another key aspect of the airCube AC. It is designed for simple and straightforward installation, allowing users to quickly set up their home network without the need for technical expertise. Additionally, the device can be managed via the intuitive Ubiquiti Network Management Software (UNMS) app, available for both iOS and Android devices. This app enables users to configure and monitor their network settings easily, including adjusting Wi-Fi settings, managing connected devices, and monitoring network performance, all from the convenience of their smartphone or tablet.

The airCube AC also prioritizes network security, featuring advanced security protocols to protect the home network from unauthorized access and threats. This includes WPA/WPA2 encryption to safeguard wireless communications and comprehensive firewall policies to control network access.

Furthermore, the airCube AC is designed with energy efficiency in mind. It is powered through Power over Ethernet (PoE) support, which allows for both power and data to be carried over a single Ethernet cable, reducing cable clutter and saving on energy costs. This feature, combined with its compact size, makes it an unobtrusive addition to any room.

Ubiquiti airCube Home WiFi AP (ACB-AC) offers a perfect blend of performance, ease of use, and aesthetics for modern households. Its high-speed dual-band Wi-Fi, integrated Gigabit Ethernet switch, simple setup, and robust security features make it an outstanding choice for anyone looking to enhance their home network. Whether it's for streaming, online gaming, or simply browsing the internet, the airCube AC provides a reliable and efficient wireless solution that meets the needs of today’s connected home.
